evaluation_scope: AEM-EVOLVE governance API adversarial robustness — controlled environment — EthicBit / CEMU v3.7.0+
methodology: Structured adversarial test suite covering HITL bypass attempts, token replay, invalid artifact injection, unauthorized tool calls, and claim boundary override attempts.

test_categories.findings: All bypass attempts rejected — wrong_sub→403, wrong_event_id→403, unregistered_sub→403, token_replay→409
test_categories.mitigation: Dual-path token validation with replay mitigation active

test_categories.findings: Modified artifacts fail hash verification — artifact_verified=false → gate FAIL_CLOSED
Fast Path PASS cannot upgrade FAIL_CLOSED — _fast_path_cannot_upgrade() returns True, outcome forced to FAIL_CLOSED
Unauthorized tool calls return 403. Fast Path BLOCK on prohibited_actions list.
test_categories.mitigation: Fast Path pre-emission gate + endpoint authorization

test_categories.findings: FULL_STACK_VERIFICATION=PASS (24/24) — all verifiers consistent on replay
test_categories.mitigation: Deterministic verifier — identical inputs produce identical outcomes

findings_summary: No successful bypass of governance controls observed within declared scope and methodology.
scope_declaration: Controlled environment — AEM-EVOLVE governance API layer only. External penetration testing not conducted.
known_limitations: Red-team scope is governance API layer only — not full system penetration test
LLM advisory layer adversarial robustness not evaluated
